# WhatAgent

> WhatAgent is the easiest way to send WhatsApp messages from code. It wraps the Meta WhatsApp Business API with a simple REST API and SDK.

## API Base URL

https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app

## Authentication — CRITICAL

All authenticated endpoints require:

```
Authorization: Bearer wha_<your-api-key>
```

**Common mistakes AI models make:**
- ❌ `X-API-Key: wha_xxx` — WRONG. WhatAgent uses standard Bearer auth, not X-API-Key.
- ❌ `Authorization: wha_xxx` — WRONG. Must include the "Bearer " prefix.
- ❌ `Authorization: Bearer <bootstrap-secret>` — WRONG. Bootstrap secret is only for first-time setup, not regular API calls.
- ✅ `Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx` — CORRECT.

API keys always start with `wha_`. If your key does not start with `wha_`, it is not valid.

## Quick Start — Copy-Paste curl Commands

### Step 1: Bootstrap (first-time setup only)

Creates your account and first API key. Uses your BOOTSTRAP_SECRET, not a wha_ key.

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/bootstrap \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer YOUR_BOOTSTRAP_SECRET" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "phone_number_id": "1036854129509651",
    "waba_id": "2858436544498712",
    "access_token": "EAAxxxxxxxxxx",
    "webhook_url": "https://your-app.com/whatsapp"
  }'
```

Response:
```json
{
  "account_id": "acc_xxx",
  "api_key": "wha_xxx",
  "display_phone_number": "+1 415 555 2671",
  "note": "Bootstrap complete. Store your API key — it will not be shown again."
}
```

**Save the `api_key` — it will not be shown again.**

### Step 2: Send a Text Message

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/messages \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"to": "+14155552671", "text": "Hello from WhatAgent!"}'
```

Response:
```json
{
  "id": "msg_xxx",
  "status": "sent",
  "to": "+14155552671",
  "meta_message_id": "wamid.xxx"
}
```

### Step 3: Send a Template Message

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/messages \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "type": "template",
    "to": "+14155552671",
    "template": {
      "name": "hello_world",
      "language": "en_US"
    }
  }'
```

### Step 4: Send an Image Message

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/messages \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "type": "image",
    "to": "+14155552671",
    "image": {
      "url": "https://example.com/image.jpg",
      "caption": "Check this out!"
    }
  }'
```

### Connect / Update Meta Credentials

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/accounts \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{
    "phone_number_id": "1036854129509651",
    "waba_id": "2858436544498712",
    "access_token": "EAAxxxxxxxxxx"
  }'
```

### Get Account Info

```bash
curl https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/accounts/me \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx"
```

### List Messages

```bash
curl "https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/messages?limit=20" \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx"
```

### Get a Specific Message

```bash
curl https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/messages/msg_xxx \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx"
```

### Generate a New API Key

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/accounts/keys \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"name": "production"}'
```

### Health Check (no auth required)

```bash
curl https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/status
```

## API Endpoints Summary

| Method | Path | Auth | Description |
|--------|------|------|-------------|
| POST | /v1/bootstrap | BOOTSTRAP_SECRET | First-time setup: create account + API key |
| POST | /v1/messages | Bearer wha_xxx | Send a WhatsApp message |
| GET | /v1/messages | Bearer wha_xxx | List sent/received messages |
| GET | /v1/messages/:id | Bearer wha_xxx | Get a single message |
| POST | /v1/accounts | Bearer wha_xxx | Connect or update Meta credentials |
| GET | /v1/accounts/me | Bearer wha_xxx | Get current account details |
| POST | /v1/accounts/keys | Bearer wha_xxx | Generate a new API key |
| GET | /v1/status | None | Health check |
| POST | /v1/webhooks/meta | None | Meta webhook receiver |

## Message Types

- `text` — plain text message (default when `type` is omitted)
- `template` — Meta-approved template message
- `image` — image with optional caption

## Phone Number Format

Use E.164 format: `+<country-code><number>` e.g. `+14155552671`, `+971501234567`

## Error Responses

```json
{ "error": "Missing or invalid Authorization header" }   // 401 — no auth header
{ "error": "Invalid API key format" }                     // 401 — key doesn't start with wha_
{ "error": "Invalid API key" }                            // 401 — key not found or revoked
{ "error": "Invalid request", "details": { ... } }        // 400 — bad request body
{ "error": "Account not found. Complete onboarding first." } // 404 — no account configured
```

## Register a Webhook (receive inbound messages)

```bash
curl -X POST https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/v1/accounts \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer wha_xxx" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"webhook_url": "https://your-app.com/whatsapp"}'
```

WhatAgent will POST to this URL when:
- A user sends you an inbound WhatsApp message
- A delivery status changes (sent/delivered/read/failed)

Webhook payload:
```json
{
  "event": "message.received",
  "message": { "id": "msg_xxx", "from": "+14155552671", "type": "text", "text": "Hello!" }
}
```

## SDK (JavaScript/TypeScript)

```bash
npm install whatagent
```

```typescript
import { WhatAgent } from 'whatagent';

const wa = new WhatAgent({ apiKey: process.env.WHATAGENT_API_KEY });
await wa.messages.send({ to: '+14155552671', text: 'Hello!' });
```

## SDK (Python)

```bash
pip install whatagent
```

```python
from whatagent import WhatAgent

wa = WhatAgent()  # reads WHATAGENT_API_KEY from env
wa.messages.send(to="+14155552671", text="Hello from Python!")
```

## MCP Server (Claude Code / Cursor / Windsurf / Cline / Devin)

No API key yet? The server runs a guided setup wizard automatically.

**Claude Code** — add to `.claude/settings.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "whatagent": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@whatagent/mcp"],
      "env": { "WHATAGENT_API_KEY": "wha_..." }
    }
  }
}
```

**Cursor** — add to `.cursor/mcp.json`:
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "whatagent": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "@whatagent/mcp"],
      "env": { "WHATAGENT_API_KEY": "wha_..." }
    }
  }
}
```

**Available MCP tools:**
- `setup_whatagent` — first-time setup wizard (shown when no API key configured)
- `send_whatsapp_message` — send a text message
- `send_whatsapp_template` — send an approved template
- `get_message_status` — check delivery status
- `list_recent_messages` — view sent/received messages
- `configure_webhook` — set a URL to receive inbound messages
- `get_account` — view account details

## OpenAPI Spec

https://whatagent-production.up.railway.app/openapi.yaml

## Source

https://github.com/rushdmowjee/whatagent
